query:
SELECT 
  p.id as productId,
  p.name as productName,
  p.sku as productSku,
  pv.id as variantId,
  pv.variantCode,
  SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, 1, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) - 1) as extractedSku
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
WHERE pv.id IS NOT NULL
  AND p.sku != SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, 1, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) - 1)
LIMIT 20;

SELECT 
  p.id as productId,
  p.name as productName,
  p.sku as productSku,
  pv.id as variantId,
  pv.variantCode,
  SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, 1, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) - 1) as extractedSku
FROM products p
LEFT JOIN product_variants pv ON p.id = pv.productId
WHERE pv.id IS NOT NULL
  AND p.sku != SUBSTRING(pv.variantCode, 1, LOCATE('-V', pv.variantCode) - 1)
LIMIT 20;
